mapper.select: SELECT user_space.id , user_space.deleted , user_space.created_at as createdAt , user_space.modified_at as modifiedAt , user_space.role , user_space.status , user_space.user_id as userId , user_space.space_id as spaceId FROM user_space WHERE user_space.id = #{id}
SELECT user_space.id FROM user_space WHERE user_space.id is not null
